case_title: YEIMI DIAZ VS. THE WHOLE BEAST LLC, A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, YEIMI AS TO DEFENDANT THE WHOLE BEAST LLC, A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
